communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Michigan Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

All contracts, grant agreements, amendments and payments between the City of Detroit and the following entities:

All Things Women
Cass Community Social Services
Coalition on Temporary Shelter (COTS)
Covenant House
Detroit Rescue Mission Ministries
Michigan Veterans Foundation
Neighborhood Service Organization (NSO)
Salvation Army Booth Services Center
St. Johns Community Center

This request includes:

-  Executed contracts and grant agreements, including amendments
-  Records sufficient to show the amount awarded, contract term and purpose of each agreement
-  Vendor payment records, including invoices, payment logs or disbursement records
-  Any available contract or vendor summary reports maintained by the City

Timeframe: Jan. 1, 2023 through April 8, 2026.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Aaron Mondry

title: 8a Pass through entity scheme. (Small Business Administration)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Please provide the status of the complaints filed against the small business Infer Solutions  and Globaltekforce for participating in the pass through entity schemes.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

RG

title: Repeat Civil and EEO cases at Office of Managment under NIH OD

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Please identify the number of Civil cases  and EEO cases filed and settled between 2019 and 2026. Provide the total amount paid to settle the cases. Identify the number of cases that are against same NIH staff member. Provide what actions have been taken by OM leadership to address the issues and decrease the cases.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

RG

title: Unfair advantage in award competition at NIH

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: Unfair advantage in award competition at NIH
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Require the Number of vendors participating in the competition for the award of contract : 47QTCA18D00J6/75N97025F00030.Conflict of interest verification as required by FAR Part 3 52.203-16,  FAR Part 9.5 , FAR 3.1103 and 3452.209-70. Provide the self attested certification and verification of the Conflict of Interest done by the Government for this contract to the email address racer006@gmail.com.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

communications.subject: Virginia Freedom of Information Act Request: NCAA Financial Statement
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Virginia Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

To Whom It May Concern,

I request the NCAA Membership Financial Reporting System revenue and expense reports for fiscal (or reporting) years 2004, 2005, 2006, 2007 & 2008.  Specifically:  

These reports are completed by the athletic department for the National Collegiate Athletic Association for the fiscal years listed above. This report is a multi-page document that had to be submitted to the NCAA in January. It contains 30+ revenue and expense categories, followed by specific breakdowns of each of those categories, by sport and gender. I am requesting the full report, including the detail tables, the “Other Reporting Items” list and the “Statement of Revenues and Expenses” that appears at the end of the report. PLEASE NOTE: The NCAA report is different than the equity report that is sent to the U.S. Department of Education for Title IX compliance.

If your department does not maintain these public records, please let me know who does and include the proper custodian’s name and address.

I prefer to receive the records electronically as an Adobe Acrobat (.pdf) file.

If you choose to deny this request, please provide a written explanation for the denial including a reference to the specific statutory exemption(s) on which you rely.  Also, please provide all segregable portions of otherwise exempt material.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 5 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Tom Nash, a citizen of Virginia, in coordination with Stacey Brook.
